game_name: Boogerman: A Pick and Flick Adventure

danger_signals.visual_form: Cape color shift from red to yellow
danger_signals.meaning: Player taking damage; one more hit results in loss of life
Hostile entities that must be defeated to progress
Major threat requiring defeat to advance narrative

danger_signals.visual_form: Mysterious arm emerging from Dimension X-Crement portal
danger_signals.meaning: Threat origin point; catalyst for adventure

safety_signals.meaning: Collectible that restores Boogerman's health status

safety_signals.visual_form: Huts that can be touched to activate checkpoints
safety_signals.meaning: Safe progression point; death returns to this location
Temporary combat enhancement or special abilities
Maximum health achieved; unlocks special ending credit acknowledgment

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Boogerman superhero identity; gross-out hero archetype
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Men's room change location; transformation point from Snotty Ragsdale identity

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: 20+ different level-specific enemies; BoogerMiester main villain
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Takey Dump location; polluted environments; portal gateway
Lab setting above Takey Dump; scientific establishment

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Level design with platforms, enemies, collectibles; side-scrolling perspective
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies unique to each level patrol and attack; player must solve puzzles to progress
Boss-level combat encounter; must defeat boss to advance

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Portal opening; mysterious arm stealing Snotrium 357; Dimension X-Crement imagery
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Snotty Ragsdale transforms into Boogerman; pursues stolen power source through portal

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Sandbox playable credit scroll with unlimited fly-fart fuel
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player gains unrestricted movement and firepower; celebratory credits sequence

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Michael Stragey name flashes in credits (Easter egg trigger)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Developer credit acknowledgment for beating game with full health

environmental_storytelling.example: Takey Dump setting establishes pollution crisis context; Professor Stinkbaum's lab above dump suggests containment/solution research
Men's room as Boogerman's change space; ordinary bathroom as superhero transformation locale adds comedic gross-out tone
20+ level-specific unique enemies create distinct environmental threats reflecting each location's character
Dimension X-Crement as polluted alternate dimension; visual contrast between safe world and contaminated portal realm
Boogerman's cape degradation from red to yellow visually communicates health state without UI; thematic to superhero identity

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Glowing red cape; full combat capability; can survive one hit cycle
Yellow cape; vulnerable state; next hit causes life loss
Unrestricted fly-fart movement in credit sequence; celebratory animation
Unique attack patterns; require defeat to progress; vary by location

entity_behavioral_tells.entity: Boss enemies (BoogerMiester, Hickboy, Deodor Ant, Revolta)
entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Major threat requiring sustained combat; defeat unlocks level progression
Steals Snotrium 357; triggers Boogerman's transformation and pursuit sequence

notes: Boogerman communicates world-state primarily through gross-out aesthetic humor and color-coded health metaphor. The red-to-yellow cape system is the primary danger signal for the player. Environmental storytelling relies on thematic level design and location-based enemy variety rather than explicit visual narrative markers. The game's faction system is simple: hero vs. polluting antagonists from Dimension X-Crement. No traditional faction colors or symbols exist; identity is conveyed through character design and location aesthetics. The game emphasizes visual gameplay feedback over complex political or world-state communication.
